check1: UNSAT (expected UNSAT) - PASS
No nontrivial solution exists for the constrained 3x3 homogeneous system
UNSAT means Z3 found no counterexample: there is no assignment of coefficients satisfying the sign/sum constraints together with a nonzero solution of the homogeneous system. Hence the only solution is x1 = x2 = x3 = 0.
